sources.title: Blue Team Hunting Field Notes (bitbug0x55AA)
sources.notes: Windows event references, artifact maps, detection rules, and DFIR field notes. Commit feed in Blue Team Field Notes section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Elastic detection-rules releases
sources.notes: ATT&CK-mapped EQL/KQL detection rules. Release feed in Detection Rule Repositories section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman AmcacheParser releases
sources.notes: Amcache parser for application inventory artifacts. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman AppCompatCacheParser releases
sources.notes: ShimCache parser across multiple Windows versions. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman DFIR-SQL-Query-Repo commits
sources.notes: SQL query templates for digital forensics. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman documentation commits
sources.notes: Zimmerman documentation repository. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman evtx releases
sources.notes: EVTX parser and supporting event-log processing logic. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman ExtensionBlocks commits
sources.notes: Extension block parsing library. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman Get-ZimmermanTools commits
sources.notes: Tool-distribution helper for the Zimmerman suite. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman GuidMapping commits
sources.notes: GUID resolution data for UserAssist, ShellBags, shell artifacts. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman JLECmd releases
sources.notes: Automatic and custom destinations Jump List parser. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman JumpList commits
sources.notes: Jump List parsing library. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman KapeDocs commits
sources.notes: KAPE documentation. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman KapeFiles commits
sources.notes: Community KAPE targets and modules. Commit feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section (each commit = new target).

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman LECmd releases
sources.notes: Shell link parser for recent files and LNK artifacts. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman Lnk commits
sources.notes: Shell link parsing library. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman MFT commits
sources.notes: NTFS MFT parsing library. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman MFTECmd releases
sources.notes: NTFS $MFT and related metadata parsing. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman OleCf commits
sources.notes: OLE compound file parsing library. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman PECmd releases
sources.notes: Prefetch parser and command-line analysis tool. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman Prefetch commits
sources.notes: Windows Prefetch parsing library. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.notes: Recycle Bin artifact parser. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman RecentFileCacheParser commits

sources.title: Eric Zimmerman RECmd releases
sources.notes: Registry command-line access and batch artifact extraction. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.notes: Timeline Explorer file plugins. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Eric Zimmerman Library Crates section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.notes: Windows Timeline and activity-cache parser. Release feed in Eric Zimmerman Tool Releases section.

sources.title: Elastic Security Labs
sources.notes: Threat research, detection engineering, malware analysis. HTML monitor in DFIR Blogs section (no RSS endpoint available).

sources.title: Microsoft Security Blog
sources.notes: Windows security, threat intelligence, detection engineering. RSS feed in Vendor and Intel Blogs section.

sources.title: SentinelOne Labs
sources.notes: Malware research, ransomware analysis, threat intelligence. RSS feed in Vendor and Intel Blogs section.

sources.title: The DFIR Report
sources.notes: Incident case studies and intrusion-analysis writeups. RSS feed in DFIR Blogs section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Volexity Blog
sources.notes: Incident response, memory forensics, APT tracking. RSS feed in Vendor and Intel Blogs section.

sources.title: Apple Platform Security
sources.notes: Primary Apple platform security documentation. Web monitor in Documentation and Reference Sources section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: GTFOBins (Linux)
sources.notes: Unix GTFOBins reference. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Living Off the Land Datasets section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: LOLBAS Project (Windows)
sources.notes: Windows LOLBAS reference. Commit feed (commits/master.atom) in Living Off the Land Datasets section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Microsoft Learn
sources.notes: Primary Windows platform and API documentation. Web monitor (Windows What's New) in Documentation and Reference Sources section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: MITRE ATT&CK CTI releases
sources.notes: ATT&CK technique and software reference. GitHub releases.atom (ATT&CK version bumps) in Documentation and Reference Sources section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Sysinternals documentation
sources.notes: Primary Sysinternals documentation and tool references. Web monitor (downloads index) in Documentation and Reference Sources section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Tor Project documentation
sources.notes: Tor deployment and network usage documentation. Web monitors (tb-manual.torproject.org and spec.torproject.org) in Documentation and Reference Sources section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Velociraptor releases
sources.notes: Velociraptor artifact and VQL documentation. GitHub releases.atom in Documentation and Reference Sources section of dfir-feeds.opml.

sources.title: Flare.io Threat Research Blog
sources.notes: Threat exposure management vendor blog. Covers dark web intelligence, malware analysis, credential theft, PAM backdoors (PamDOORa), ransomware TTPs. RSS feed is standard WordPress. Added 2026-05-11 after PamDOORa analysis.
